ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_system" TEXT /* Sizing system (e.g., US, UK) */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L, XL, 2XL, 3XL) */,
  "size_value" TEXT /* Value corresponding to the size label */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the size (e.g., male, female, unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the size (e.g., children, adults) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type for the size (e.g., slim, regular, relaxed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion */,
  "from_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being converted from */,
  "to_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being converted to */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., direct, indirect via measurements) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_to_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_from_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size these measurements correspond to */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement range for the size */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range for the size */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement range for the size */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement range for the size */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement for the size */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement for the size (for pants/jeans) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the item belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the item belongs to */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material composition of the item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage on the item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_sizes" (
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item-size combination */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size available for the item */,
  "stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for low stock alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item-size combination */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level for the item size */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the item size is expected to be restocked */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "next_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the next stock check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_size_id") REFERENCES item_sizes ("item_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "preferred_size_system" TEXT /* Preferred sizing system of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "reward_points" INTEGER /* Reward points accumulated by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer these measurements correspond to */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement of the customer */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement of the customer */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement of the customer */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement of the customer */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement of the customer */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item in the order */,
  "discounted_price" REAL /* Discounted price of the item in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer receiving the recommendation */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item the recommendation is for */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size for the item */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., based on measurements, past purchases) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the profile belongs to */,
  "preference" TEXT /* Preferences of the customer */,
  "past_purchases" TEXT /* Past purchase history of the customer */,
  "favorite_brands" TEXT /* Favorite brands of the customer */,
  "favorite_categories" TEXT /* Favorite categories of the customer */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer accessing the item page */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the item page was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, add to cart) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the item */,
  "trend_score" REAL /* Trend score of the size */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the item */,
  "add_to_cart_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the item was added to cart */,
  "purchase_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the item was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
